template_block.name: goal
template_block.title: Goal
template_block.statement: Review content and information quality to understand clarity, risk, and gaps, without rewriting or redesigning content.

template_block.name: context
template_block.title: Context
template_block.statement: This is a diagnostic review, not a content improvement exercise.

template_block.name: source
template_block.title: Source
template_block.statement: Use only content examples or descriptions I provide.

checklist.entry: Where is language complex or ambiguous?
What could be out of date?
What depends on policy or guidance?
Could misunderstanding cause harm, exclusion, or poor decisions?

template_block.name: linting-rules-machine-readable-yaml
template_block.title: Linting Rules (Machine‑Readable YAML)
template_block.statement: content_review_integrity: description: > Content reviews must assess risk and clarity, not rewrite or propose solutions. rule: Reject outputs that include rewritten content or recommendations.
no_content_rewrites: description: Must not propose alternative wording or copy. severity: error
risks_required: description: Review must surface clarity, accuracy, or harm risks. severity: error
unknowns_required: description: Gaps in knowledge or assurance must be recorded as Unknown. severity: error
tone: allowed: [neutral, analytical, risk-aware] disallowed: [editorial, directive, persuasive] severity: error ```
If any lint rule is violated, the assistant must rewrite its output before responding.
